chain.thought: Explanation: The fastest time among all records is 5:19.35, achieved by the m8+ (eight) crew from Canada in 2012 at Lucerne, Switzerland. Therefore, Canada had the fastest record.

judge_thought: Explanation: The table lists best times by multiple distinct boat classes (e.g., single sculls, coxless four, eight, lightweight categories), each with its own performance context. There is no unified field or criterion in the table that designates a single “overall fastest record” across these heterogeneous categories, nor an explicit summary identifying one nation as the fastest. Because the dataset does not define comparability across classes, returning “null” correctly reflects that the table does not provide a determinate, singular nation holding “the fastest record.”
